@graph.activity-id:name: CMIP
@graph.activity-id:description: CMIP DECK: 1pctCO2, abrupt4xCO2, amip, esm-piControl, esm-historical, historical, and piControl experiments

@graph.activity-id:name: LESFMIP
@graph.activity-id:description: The Large Ensemble Single Forcing Model Intercomparison Project

@graph.source-type:name: AER
@graph.source-type:description: aerosol treatment in an atmospheric model where concentrations are calculated based on emissions, transformation, and removal processes (rather than being prescribed or omitted entirely)

@graph.source-type:name: AGCM
@graph.source-type:description: atmospheric general circulation model run with prescribed ocean surface conditions and usually a model of the land surface

@graph.source-type:name: AOGCM
@graph.source-type:description: coupled atmosphere-ocean global climate model, additionally including explicit representation of at least the land and sea ice

@graph.source-type:name: BGC
@graph.source-type:description: biogeochemistry model component that at the very least accounts for carbon reservoirs and fluxes in the atmosphere, terrestrial biosphere, and ocean

@graph.source-type:name: CHEM
@graph.source-type:description: chemistry treatment in an atmospheric model that calculates atmospheric oxidant concentrations (including at least ozone), rather than prescribing them

@graph.source-type:name: LAND
@graph.source-type:description: land model run uncoupled from the atmosphere

@graph.source-type:name: OGCM
@graph.source-type:description: ocean general circulation model run uncoupled from an AGCM but, usually including a sea-ice model

@graph.source-type:name: RAD
@graph.source-type:description: radiation component of an atmospheric model run 'offline'

@graph.source-type:name: SLAB
@graph.source-type:description: slab-ocean used with an AGCM in representing the atmosphere-ocean coupled system

@graph.source-id:name: NorESM2-LM
@graph.source-id:label: NorESM2-LM
@graph.source-id:label_extended: NorESM2-LM (low atmosphere-medium ocean resolution, GHG concentration driven)

@graph.model-component:description: CAM-OSLO (2 degree resolution; 144 x 96; 32 levels; top level 3 mb)
CCSR AGCM (T85; 256 x 128 longitude/latitude; 81 levels; top level 0.004 hPa)
CICE-HadGEM3-GSI8 (eORCA1 tripolar primarily 1 deg; 360 x 330 longitude/latitude)
ECHAM6.3 (spectral T63; 192 x 96 longitude/latitude; 47 levels; top level 0.01 hPa)
GISS-E2.1 (2.5x2 degree; 144 x 90 longitude/latitude; 40 levels; top level 0.1 hPa)
GISS Ocean (GO1, 1 degree; 360 x 180 longitude/latitude; 40 levels; top grid cell 0-10 m)
MetUM-HadGEM3-GA7.1 (N96; 192 x 144 longitude/latitude; 85 levels; top level 85 km)
MICOM (1 degree resolution; 360 x 384; 70 levels; top grid cell minimum 0-2.5 m [native model uses hybrid density and generic upper-layer coordinate interpolated to z-level for contributed data])
MPIOM1.63 (bipolar GR1.5, approximately 1.5deg; 256 x 220 longitude/latitude; 40 levels; top grid cell 0-12 m)
NEMO-HadGEM3-GO6.0 (eORCA1 tripolar primarily 1 deg with meridional refinement down to 1/3 degree in the tropics; 360 x 330 longitude/latitude; 75 levels; top grid cell 0-1 m)
unnamed (thermodynamic (Semtner zero-layer) dynamic (Hibler 79) sea ice model)
Varies with physics-version (p==1 Non-interactive, p>1 GPUCCINI)

pre-industrial control simulation with CO2 concentration calculated (spin-up)
